words.simpleDefinition: no person; not anyone
to look at something carefully to learn about it

words.meaning: v. 放置，产卵；adj. 外行的
words.simpleDefinition: to put something down carefully or in a flat position
how fast someone or something moves
ideas and activities about government and power

words.meaning: v. 回答，回应；n. 答复
words.simpleDefinition: to answer someone in speech, writing, or action

words.meaning: v. 展示，显示；n. 展览，陈列
words.simpleDefinition: to show something so people can see it

words.meaning: v. 转移，传递；n. 转账，调任
words.simpleDefinition: to move someone or something from one place to another
as good as possible, with no mistakes
a little; not very much

words.meaning: adj. 全面的，总体的；adv. 总的来说
words.simpleDefinition: including everything or considering the whole situation
to plan or mean to do something
a person who uses a thing, service, or system
to answer or react to someone or something
the main meal of the day, often eaten in the evening
not fast, or to become less fast
happening often or following a normal pattern
related to the body or to real objects
separated by distance, time, or feeling

words.meaning: n. 套装，诉讼；v. 适合
words.simpleDefinition: to be right for someone, or a formal jacket and trousers
related to a central national government
to make something known that was hidden or secret
an amount shown as part of one hundred
a time or state without war or fighting
someone's position, rank, or official situation
an illegal action that can be punished by law

words.meaning: v. 拒绝，下降；n. 衰退
words.simpleDefinition: to become less, or to politely refuse
a period of ten years

words.meaning: v. 发射，发起；n. 发布
words.simpleDefinition: to start, send, or introduce something new
to tell someone about possible danger or a problem
a person who buys or uses goods and services

words.meaning: n. 恩惠，赞成；v. 偏爱
words.simpleDefinition: a kind action, support, or preference for someone

words.meaning: adj. 干的，干燥的；v. 使干燥
words.simpleDefinition: not wet, or to make something not wet

words.meaning: n. 伙伴，搭档；v. 与...合作
words.simpleDefinition: a person you work, live, or do something with
a large organization such as a school, bank, or hospital

words.meaning: n. 地点，斑点；v. 发现，认出
words.simpleDefinition: a place, mark, or small area
a large animal people can ride or use for work
in the end, after some time
warmth or high temperature
to make someone feel very interested or happy
a person who reads
the quality of being important or valuable

words.meaning: n. 距离，远处；v. 疏远
words.simpleDefinition: the amount of space between two places or things

words.meaning: n. 向导，指南；v. 引导
words.simpleDefinition: to show someone where to go or what to do

words.meaning: v. 授予，同意；n. 补助金
words.simpleDefinition: to give someone something officially

words.meaning: n. 出租车；v. 乘出租车
words.simpleDefinition: a car with a driver that you pay to take you somewhere

words.meaning: v. 喂养，提供；n. 饲料
words.simpleDefinition: to give food to a person or animal

words.meaning: n. 疼痛，痛苦；v. 使痛苦
words.simpleDefinition: an unpleasant feeling in the body or mind
one part of an economy, activity, or area

words.meaning: n. 错误；v. 误解，弄错
words.simpleDefinition: something that is wrong or done incorrectly
to make certain that something happens
to give someone what they need or want

words.meaning: n. 首领，主管；adj. 主要的
words.simpleDefinition: main or most important; a leader

words.meaning: adj. 凉爽的，冷静的；v. 使冷却
words.simpleDefinition: slightly cold, calm, or fashionable
a person with a lot of skill or knowledge

words.meaning: n. 波浪，挥手；v. 波动，招手
words.simpleDefinition: to move your hand to greet someone, or a raised line of water

words.meaning: n. 南方；adj. 南方的；adv. 向南
words.simpleDefinition: the direction opposite north

words.meaning: n. 劳动，工作；v. 劳动
words.simpleDefinition: work, especially hard physical work

words.meaning: n. 表面；v. 浮出水面
words.simpleDefinition: the outside or top layer of something
a place where books and other materials are kept
very good; of very high quality

words.meaning: n. 边缘，优势；v. 慢慢移动
words.simpleDefinition: the outside line or border of something

words.meaning: n. 营地，阵营；v. 露营
words.simpleDefinition: a place where people stay in tents or simple buildings
the people watching or listening to a performance

words.meaning: v. 举起，提升；n. 电梯
words.simpleDefinition: to raise something or someone
an official or usual way of doing something

words.meaning: n. 电子邮件；v. 发电子邮件
words.simpleDefinition: a message sent by computer or phone
relating to the whole world

words.meaning: v. 挣扎，奋斗；n. 斗争
words.simpleDefinition: to try very hard to do something difficult
to tell people about a product, service, or event

words.meaning: v. 选择，挑选；adj. 精选的
words.simpleDefinition: to choose someone or something
to be all around someone or something
how large, important, or serious something is
a long natural flow of water
happening once every year
completely

words.meaning: n. 对比，差别；v. 对比
words.simpleDefinition: to compare differences, or a clear difference

words.meaning: v. 滚动，卷；n. 卷，名册
words.simpleDefinition: to move by turning over and over
the true situation, not an idea or dream
a picture made with a camera
a person who creates art

words.meaning: n. 冲突，矛盾；v. 冲突
words.simpleDefinition: a serious disagreement or fight
whole or complete
the fact that someone or something is in a place

words.meaning: n. 人群，群众；v. 挤满
words.simpleDefinition: a large group of people together

words.meaning: n. 角落，拐角；v. 使走投无路
words.simpleDefinition: the place where two lines, roads, or walls meet
a substance like air, or fuel for a car

words.meaning: v. 转移，改变；n. 转变，轮班
words.simpleDefinition: to move or change, or a period of work time

words.meaning: n. 网，净额；adj. 净的；v. 捕获
words.simpleDefinition: material with holes used to catch or hold things
a group of people or things of the same type
a person who organizes office work and records
protection from attack or criticism
fast or taking little time
to prepare food by heating it

words.meaning: v. 传播，展开；n. 蔓延
words.simpleDefinition: to move or make something move over a larger area
related to the energy inside atoms

words.meaning: n. 规模，天平；v. 攀登
words.simpleDefinition: the size or level of something
a person who drives a vehicle
a round object used in games

words.meaning: v. 哭泣，喊叫；n. 哭声
words.simpleDefinition: to produce tears or make a loud sound

questions.prompt: The car was traveling at a high __________ when it lost control on the icy road.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"speed" 是名词，作介词 "at" 的宾语，构成 "at a high speed"（高速）这一固定搭配。句意是"当车在结冰的路面上失控时，它正以高速行驶"。

questions.prompt: She studied __________ at university and now works for the local government.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"politics" 是名词，作动词 "studied" 的宾语。句意是"她在大学学习政治学，现在为地方政府工作"。politics 表示"政治学"这一学科。

questions.prompt: The medication may make you feel __________ dizzy for the first few days.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"slightly" 是副词，修饰形容词 "dizzy"，表示程度"轻微地"。句意是"这种药物可能会让你在最初几天感到轻微眩晕"。

questions.prompt: The bank will __________ the funds to your account within three business days.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"transfer" 是动词，作句子的谓语。句意是"银行将在三个工作日内将资金转账到您的账户"。"transfer funds" 是固定搭配，表示"转账"。

questions.prompt: The doctor will __________ your throat to determine the cause of your pain.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"examine" 是动词，作句子的谓语。句意是"医生会检查你的喉咙以确定疼痛的原因"。"examine" 在医学语境中表示"检查、诊察"。

questions.prompt: After months of practice, her piano technique was almost __________.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"perfect" 是形容词，作表语，补充说明主语 "technique" 的状态。句意是"经过数月的练习，她的钢琴技巧几乎完美了"。

questions.prompt: I sent him an email last week, but he didn't __________ until yesterday.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"reply" 是动词，作句子的谓语。句意是"我上周给他发了邮件，但他直到昨天才回复"。"reply" 表示"回复"，常用于 "reply to" 结构。

questions.prompt: The museum will __________ the new collection of ancient artifacts next month.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"display" 是动词，作句子的谓语。句意是"博物馆将在下个月展出新的古代文物收藏"。"display" 表示"展览、陈列"。

questions.prompt: Please __________ the books on the table before you leave.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"lay" 是及物动词，表示"放置"，后接宾语 "the books"。句意是"离开前请把书放在桌子上"。注意区分 "lay"（放置，及物）和 "lie"（躺，不及物）。

questions.prompt: After the accident, __________ was injured as everyone had evacuated in time.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"nobody" 是不定代词，作句子的主语，表示"没有人"。句意是"事故发生后，没有人受伤，因为每个人都及时疏散了"。

---

questions.prompt: The website provides a helpful guide for new __________ who are unfamiliar with the platform.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"user" 是可数名词，此处用复数形式 "users" 作介词 "for" 的宾语。句意是"该网站为不熟悉平台的新用户提供了有用的指南"。

questions.prompt: Emergency services __________ quickly to the call about the fire.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"respond" 是不及物动词，此处用过去式 "responded"。句意是"紧急服务部门对火灾报警迅速做出了反应"。"respond to" 是固定搭配，表示"对……做出反应"。

questions.prompt: She goes for __________ check-ups at the doctor's office every six months.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"regular" 是形容词，修饰名词 "check-ups"。句意是"她每六个月去医生办公室做定期检查"。"regular check-ups" 表示"定期检查"。

questions.prompt: We're having a formal __________ with the CEO tomorrow evening.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"dinner" 是名词，作动词 "having" 的宾语。句意是"明天晚上我们要和首席执行官共进正式晚餐"。"have dinner" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The __________ performance of the team has improved since the new coach arrived.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"overall" 是形容词，修饰名词 "performance"，表示"整体的、全面的"。句意是"自从新教练到来后，团队的整体表现有所改善"。

questions.prompt: Traffic tends to __________ down during rush hour in the city center.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"slow" 是动词，与 "down" 构成短语动词 "slow down"，表示"减速、放慢"。句意是"在市中心的高峰时段，交通往往会放慢"。

questions.prompt: This blue __________ is perfect for your job interview tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"suit" 是名词，表示"西装、套装"。句意是"这套蓝色西装非常适合你明天的工作面试"。

questions.prompt: I __________ to finish this project by Friday, but I might need more time.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"intend" 是动词，作句子的谓语。句意是"我打算在周五前完成这个项目，但我可能需要更多时间"。"intend to do" 表示"打算做某事"。

questions.prompt: The job requires significant __________ strength and endurance.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"physical" 是形容词，修饰名词 "strength"。句意是"这份工作需要相当大的体力和耐力"。"physical strength" 表示"体力"。

questions.prompt: The couple decided to live __________ for a while before finalizing their divorce.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"apart" 是副词，此处用于 "live apart" 这一固定搭配，表示"分开居住"。句意是"这对夫妇决定在最终离婚前分开住一段时间"。

---

questions.prompt: The investigation will __________ who was responsible for the security breach.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"reveal" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"揭示、透露"。句意是"调查将揭示谁对安全漏洞负责"。

questions.prompt: After years of conflict, the two countries finally signed a __________ treaty.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"peace" 是名词，修饰名词 "treaty"，构成 "peace treaty"（和平条约）这一固定搭配。句意是"经过多年冲突后，两国终于签署了和平条约"。

questions.prompt: The __________ government announced new regulations for all states to follow.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"federal" 是形容词，修饰名词 "government"，表示"联邦的"。句意是"联邦政府宣布了所有州都要遵守的新规定"。

questions.prompt: His __________ as a certified professional gives him credibility in the industry.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"status" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"地位、身份"。句意是"他作为认证专业人士的身份使他在行业中具有可信度"。

questions.prompt: The meteorologists __________ that a severe storm was approaching the coast.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"warn" 是动词，此处用过去式 "warned"。句意是"气象学家警告说一场严重的暴风雨正在接近海岸"。"warn that" 表示"警告说……"。

questions.prompt: The __________ rate has decreased significantly in this neighborhood over the past year.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"crime" 是名词，修饰名词 "rate"，构成 "crime rate"（犯罪率）这一固定搭配。句意是"去年这个社区的犯罪率显著下降"。

questions.prompt: I must __________ your invitation to the party as I'll be out of town.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"decline" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"谢绝、拒绝"。句意是"我必须谢绝你的聚会邀请，因为我那时会出城"。"decline an invitation" 表示"谢绝邀请"。

questions.prompt: Only a small __________ of students achieve perfect scores on the exam.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"percentage" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"百分比、比例"。句意是"只有一小部分学生在考试中取得满分"。"a small percentage of" 表示"一小部分"。

questions.prompt: It took almost a __________ to complete the construction of the new stadium.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"decade" 是名词，表示"十年"。句意是"建造新体育场几乎花了十年时间"。

questions.prompt: The company will __________ its new product line at next month's trade show.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"launch" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"发布、推出"。句意是"该公司将在下个月的贸易展上推出其新产品线"。"launch a product" 是固定搭配。

---

questions.prompt: Hang the clothes outside to __________ in the sun after washing them.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"dry" 是动词，作不定式 "to dry" 的一部分，表示"使干燥、晾干"。句意是"洗完衣服后把它们挂在外面晾干"。

questions.prompt: She's my business __________ and we've been working together for five years.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"partner" 是名词，表示"合伙人、搭档"。句意是"她是我的商业伙伴，我们已经合作五年了"。"business partner" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The children were __________ about going to the amusement park for the first time.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"excite" 的过去分词 "excited" 作形容词，表示"兴奋的"。句意是"孩子们第一次去游乐园感到很兴奋"。"be excited about" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: Could you do me a __________ and pick up my package from the post office?
questions.explanation: 语法上，"favor" 是名词，用于固定短语 "do sb a favor"，表示"帮某人一个忙"。句意是"你能帮我一个忙，从邮局取我的包裹吗？"

questions.prompt: Although progress was slow, they __________ completed the project on time.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"eventually" 是副词，修饰整个句子，表示"最终、终于"。句意是"尽管进展缓慢，他们最终按时完成了项目"。

questions.prompt: The __________ galloped across the field with impressive speed and grace.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"horse" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"马"。句意是"那匹马以惊人的速度和优雅姿态飞奔过田野"。

questions.prompt: The university is a prestigious academic __________ with a long history.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"institution" 是名词，表示"机构、学院"。句意是"这所大学是一所历史悠久的著名学术机构"。"academic institution" 表示"学术机构"。

questions.prompt: I found the perfect __________ for our picnic under that large oak tree.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"spot" 是名词，表示"地点、场所"。句意是"我在那棵大橡树下找到了野餐的完美地点"。

questions.prompt: The new policy is designed to protect __________ rights when shopping online.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"consumer" 是名词，修饰名词 "rights"，构成 "consumer rights"（消费者权益）。句意是"新政策旨在保护网上购物时的消费者权益"。

questions.prompt: Turn on the __________ because it's getting cold in here.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"heat" 是名词，表示"暖气、热量"。句意是"打开暖气，因为这里越来越冷了"。"turn on the heat" 表示"打开暖气"。

---

questions.prompt: I made a __________ in my calculations, which affected the final result.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"mistake" 是名词，作动词 "made" 的宾语。句意是"我在计算中犯了一个错误，影响了最终结果"。"make a mistake" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The athlete played through the __________ of his injured shoulder during the championship game.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"pain" 是名词，作介词 "through" 的宾语。句意是"这位运动员在锦标赛期间忍着肩伤的疼痛比赛"。"play through the pain" 表示"忍痛比赛"。

questions.prompt: This book will __________ you through the basics of computer programming.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"guide" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"指导、引导"。句意是"这本书将指导你学习计算机编程的基础知识"。"guide sb through sth" 表示"引导某人完成某事"。

questions.prompt: The foundation will __________ scholarships to ten outstanding students this year.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"grant" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"授予、给予"。句意是"该基金会今年将向十名优秀学生授予奖学金"。"grant scholarships" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: As an avid __________, she always has at least three books on her nightstand.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"reader" 是名词，表示"读者、爱读书的人"。句意是"作为一个狂热的读者，她的床头柜上总是至少有三本书"。"avid reader" 表示"热心读者"。

questions.prompt: The technology __________ has seen rapid growth in recent years.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"sector" 是名词，表示"部门、行业"。句意是"近年来科技行业发展迅速"。"technology sector" 表示"科技行业"。

questions.prompt: We took a __________ from the airport to our hotel in the city center.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"taxi" 是名词，作动词 "took" 的宾语。句意是"我们从机场乘出租车到市中心的酒店"。"take a taxi" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The professor emphasized the __________ of critical thinking in academic research.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"importance" 是名词，作动词 "emphasized" 的宾语，表示"重要性"。句意是"教授强调了批判性思维在学术研究中的重要性"。"the importance of" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: You can see the mountains in the __________, but it would take several hours to reach them.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"distance" 是名词，用于固定短语 "in the distance"，表示"在远处"。句意是"你可以看到远处的山脉，但到达那里需要几个小时"。

questions.prompt: Remember to __________ the pets before you leave for work in the morning.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"feed" 是动词，作不定式 "to feed" 的一部分，表示"喂养"。句意是"记得在早上上班前喂宠物"。

---

questions.prompt: This solution should __________ the requirements of even the most demanding clients.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"satisfy" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"满足"。句意是"这个解决方案应该能满足即使是最苛刻客户的要求"。"satisfy requirements" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: Scratch marks were visible on the __________ of the antique wooden table.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"surface" 是名词，表示"表面"。句意是"古董木桌的表面上可见划痕"。"on the surface" 表示"在表面上"。

questions.prompt: The construction of the pyramid required the __________ of thousands of workers.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"labor" 是名词，表示"劳动、劳力"。句意是"金字塔的建造需要数千名工人的劳动"。"the labor of" 表示"……的劳动"。

questions.prompt: The evening breeze made the temperature __________ down to a comfortable level.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"cool" 是动词，与 "down" 构成短语动词 "cool down"，表示"冷却、降温"。句意是"傍晚的微风使温度降到了舒适的水平"。

questions.prompt: They consulted an __________ in cybersecurity to protect their sensitive data.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"expert" 是名词，表示"专家"。句意是"他们咨询了网络安全专家来保护敏感数据"。"an expert in" 表示"……方面的专家"。

questions.prompt: The __________ executive officer announced the company's new strategic direction.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"chief" 是形容词，修饰名词短语 "executive officer"。句意是"首席执行官宣布了公司的新战略方向"。"chief executive officer (CEO)" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: Many birds migrate __________ during the winter months to find warmer climates.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"south" 是副词，表示方向"向南"。句意是"许多鸟类在冬季向南迁徙以寻找更温暖的气候"。"migrate south" 表示"向南迁徙"。

questions.prompt: We need to __________ that all safety protocols are followed during the event.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"ensure" 是动词，作不定式 "to ensure" 的一部分，表示"确保"。句意是"我们需要确保活动期间遵守所有安全规程"。"ensure that" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: I spent hours researching in the __________ for my history project.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"library" 是名词，作介词 "in" 的宾语，表示"图书馆"。句意是"我在图书馆花了几个小时为历史项目做研究"。

questions.prompt: She __________ goodbye to her friends as the train departed from the station.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"wave" 是动词，此处用过去式 "waved"，表示"挥手"。句意是"当火车从车站开出时，她向朋友们挥手告别"。"wave goodbye" 是固定搭配。

---

questions.prompt: The restaurant received __________ reviews from food critics and customers alike.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"excellent" 是形容词，修饰名词 "reviews"，表示"极好的、优秀的"。句意是"这家餐厅收到了美食评论家和顾客的好评"。

questions.prompt: The children will be going to summer __________ for two weeks in July.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"camp" 是名词，表示"营地、夏令营"。句意是"孩子们将在七月参加为期两周的夏令营"。"summer camp" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: Could you help me __________ this heavy box onto the shelf?
questions.explanation: 语法上，"lift" 是动词，作不定式 "to lift" 的一部分，表示"举起、抬起"。句意是"你能帮我把这个重箱子抬到架子上吗？"

questions.prompt: Many families __________ to pay their bills during the economic recession.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"struggle" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"挣扎、努力"。句意是"在经济衰退期间，许多家庭努力支付账单"。"struggle to do" 表示"努力做某事"。

questions.prompt: Companies __________ their products on social media to reach younger consumers.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"advertise" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"做广告、宣传"。句意是"公司在社交媒体上为其产品做广告以吸引年轻消费者"。

questions.prompt: The doctor explained the surgical __________ in detail before the operation.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"procedure" 是名词，表示"程序、步骤"。句意是"医生在手术前详细解释了手术程序"。"surgical procedure" 表示"外科手术"。

questions.prompt: Be careful near the __________ of the cliff as it can be dangerous.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"edge" 是名词，表示"边缘"。句意是"小心悬崖边缘，因为那里可能很危险"。"the edge of" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The __________ applauded enthusiastically at the end of the performance.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"audience" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"观众"。句意是"演出结束时，观众热烈鼓掌"。

questions.prompt: Please send me an __________ with the details of the meeting.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"email" 是名词，作动词 "send" 的宾语，表示"电子邮件"。句意是"请给我发一封包含会议详情的电子邮件"。"send an email" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: Climate change is a __________ issue that affects all countries.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"global" 是形容词，修饰名词 "issue"，表示"全球的"。句意是"气候变化是一个影响所有国家的全球性问题"。"global issue" 表示"全球性问题"。

---

questions.prompt: I was shocked by the __________ of the damage caused by the flood.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"extent" 是名词，作介词 "by" 的宾语，表示"程度、范围"。句意是"我对洪水造成的破坏程度感到震惊"。"the extent of" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The __________ flows through the center of the city and divides it into two parts.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"river" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"河流"。句意是"这条河流经城市中心，将城市分为两部分"。

questions.prompt: Tall mountains __________ the valley, creating a stunning landscape.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"surround" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"环绕、围绕"。句意是"高山环绕着山谷，形成了令人惊叹的景观"。

questions.prompt: The baker will __________ the dough before shaping it into loaves.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"roll" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"擀、滚动"。句意是"面包师会在把面团塑形成面包之前擀面团"。"roll the dough" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The company holds an __________ conference for all employees in December.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"annual" 是形容词，修饰名词 "conference"，表示"年度的"。句意是"该公司在十二月为所有员工举办年度会议"。"annual conference" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: I'm not __________ convinced that this is the right approach to the problem.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"fully" 是副词，修饰形容词 "convinced"，表示"完全地"。句意是"我不完全相信这是解决问题的正确方法"。"not fully convinced" 表示"不完全确信"。

questions.prompt: Please __________ a date for your appointment from the available options.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"select" 是动词，作祈使句的谓语，表示"选择"。句意是"请从可用选项中选择一个预约日期"。

questions.prompt: The bright colors of the painting __________ sharply with the dark background.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"contrast" 是动词，作句子的谓语，表示"对比、形成对照"。句意是"画作的明亮色彩与深色背景形成鲜明对比"。"contrast with" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: This __________ of my grandparents was taken on their wedding day.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"photograph" 是名词，表示"照片"。句意是"这张我祖父母的照片是在他们的婚礼当天拍摄的"。

questions.prompt: Sometimes our expectations don't match with __________, leading to disappointment.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"reality" 是名词，作介词 "with" 的宾语，表示"现实"。句意是"有时我们的期望与现实不符，导致失望"。"match with reality" 表示"与现实相符"。

---

questions.prompt: There's a __________ between what he says and what he actually does.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"conflict" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"冲突、矛盾"。句意是"他所说的和他实际做的之间存在矛盾"。"a conflict between A and B" 表示"A和B之间的冲突"。

questions.prompt: A large __________ gathered outside the stadium hours before the concert.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"crowd" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"人群"。句意是"音乐会开始前几个小时，一大群人聚集在体育场外"。"a large crowd" 表示"一大群人"。

questions.prompt: The price of __________ has increased significantly over the past few months.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"gas" 是名词，表示"汽油、天然气"。句意是"过去几个月汽油价格大幅上涨"。"the price of gas" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: My work __________ changes every week, so my sleep schedule is irregular.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"shift" 是名词，表示"轮班、班次"。句意是"我的工作班次每周都在变化，所以我的睡眠时间表不规律"。"work shift" 表示"工作班次"。

questions.prompt: There's a coffee shop on the __________ of Main Street and Fifth Avenue.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"corner" 是名词，表示"拐角、角落"。句意是"主街和第五大道的拐角处有一家咖啡店"。"on the corner of" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: She read the __________ book in just one day because it was so engaging.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"entire" 是形容词，修饰名词 "book"，表示"整个的、全部的"。句意是"她仅用一天就读完了整本书，因为它太引人入胜了"。

questions.prompt: The __________ of security personnel helped everyone feel safer at the event.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"presence" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"在场、存在"。句意是"保安人员的在场使活动中的每个人都感到更安全"。"the presence of" 表示"……的存在"。

questions.prompt: The famous __________ will exhibit her paintings in the gallery next month.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"artist" 是名词，表示"艺术家"。句意是"这位著名艺术家下个月将在画廊展出她的画作"。

questions.prompt: This product falls into the __________ of luxury goods based on its price and quality.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"category" 是名词，作介词 "into" 的宾语，表示"类别、范畴"。句意是"根据价格和质量，该产品属于奢侈品类别"。"fall into the category of" 表示"属于……类别"。

questions.prompt: Fishermen cast their __________ into the sea early in the morning.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"net" 是名词，作动词 "cast" 的宾语，表示"网"。句意是"渔民们一大早就把网撒到海里"。"cast a net" 是固定搭配，表示"撒网"。

---

questions.prompt: The lawyer presented a strong __________ argument that convinced the jury.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"defense" 是名词，修饰名词 "argument"，构成 "defense argument"（辩护论点）。句意是"律师提出了有力的辩护论点，说服了陪审团"。

questions.prompt: The __________ took notes during the meeting and will distribute them later.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"secretary" 是名词，作句子的主语，表示"秘书"。句意是"秘书在会议期间做了笔记，稍后会分发"。

questions.prompt: News of the company's success __________ rapidly through the business community.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"spread" 是动词，此处用过去式 "spread"（过去式和原形同形），表示"传播、扩散"。句意是"公司成功的消息迅速在商界传播开来"。

questions.prompt: We need a __________ solution to this problem before it gets worse.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"quick" 是形容词，修饰名词 "solution"，表示"快速的"。句意是"我们需要在问题恶化之前找到快速解决方案"。"a quick solution" 表示"快速解决方案"。

questions.prompt: The bus __________ was very helpful in giving directions to tourists.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"driver" 是名词，表示"司机"。句意是"公交车司机非常乐于助人，为游客指路"。"bus driver" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: My father loves to __________ traditional dishes from his hometown.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"cook" 是动词，作不定式 "to cook" 的一部分，表示"烹饪"。句意是"我父亲喜欢烹饪家乡的传统菜肴"。

questions.prompt: The baby's __________ woke the parents in the middle of the night.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"cry" 是名词，表示"哭声、叫声"。句意是"婴儿的哭声在半夜吵醒了父母"。"the baby's cry" 表示"婴儿的哭声"。

questions.prompt: Several countries have signed treaties to limit __________ weapons development.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"nuclear" 是形容词，修饰名词 "weapons"，表示"核的"。句意是"几个国家签署了限制核武器发展的条约"。"nuclear weapons" 是固定搭配。

questions.prompt: The project was completed on a much larger __________ than initially planned.
questions.explanation: 语法上，"scale" 是名词，表示"规模、范围"。句意是"该项目的完成规模比最初计划的要大得多"。"on a scale" 表示"以……规模"。

questions.prompt: The children were playing with a colorful __________ in the backyard.
questions.explanation:
语法上，"ball" 是名词，表示"球"。句意是"孩子们在后院玩一个彩色的球"。"play with a ball" 是固定搭配。

---
